title: Zelda Majora's Mask: 3rd Boss Battle
description:
Español: el tercer jefe de templo (great bay temple) de zelda majoras mask para nintendo 64 y el cinema donde aparece el tercer gigante. Si se que la pelea pudo ser mas corta. ¡Disfruten el video! 

English: the third temble's boss (great bay temple) in zelda majoras mask for nintendo 64 and the cutscene where the third giant appears. Yeah, I know I played bad and it could be easier, but this was my first time. Enjoy!
